rationale: An elementary conjunction is a finite conjunction of literals, so def:literal is the load-bearing constituent and was missing (statement hyperrefs it). Exact mirror of def:elementary-disjunction (0071).
notes: Duplication flag: the statement says 'it is a term', and def:term is the conjunction-of-literals node -- so elementary-conjunction and def:term are synonyms (just as elementary-disjunction = def:clause at 0071). Dedup candidate. Added def:literal (the building block) rather than a circular edge to def:term.
